message:
security(mysql): Add savepoint name validation to prevent SQL injection

- Add validate_savepoint_name() function that checks:
  - Name is not empty
  - Name starts with letter or underscore
  - Name only contains alphanumeric, underscore, or dollar sign chars
  - Name is at most 64 characters
- Apply validation in savepoint, rollback_to, and release methods
- Add unit tests for validation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
